scripts.check: pnpm -C backend run build && pnpm -C frontend run build && pnpm -C backend run db:check && node .tdad/scripts/validate-workflows.mjs && pnpm run check:security
scripts.check:security: pnpm -C backend audit --prod --audit-level low && pnpm -C backend audit --dev --audit-level low && pnpm -C frontend audit --prod --audit-level low && pnpm -C frontend audit --dev --audit-level low
